summary: Comprehensive E2E workflow testing for MuscleGrid CRM. All features verified working: Full workflow (Customer→Support→Supervisor→Accountant→Technician→Dispatcher), Admin Analytics pie charts, Duplicate ticket prevention, Admin SSO to all dashboards, Accountant Hardware Tab with notes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E2E workflow features verified. Complete workflow from Customer ticket creation to Dispatcher shipping works end-to-end.

e2e_workflow.details: Complete workflow tested: Customer creates tickets, Support escalates (requires 100+ char notes), Supervisor decides (resolve/reverse_pickup/spare_dispatch), Accountant creates dispatches, Technician repairs, Dispatcher ships

duplicate_ticket_prevention.details: API endpoint /api/tickets/check-duplicate works correctly with serial_number and order_id parameters

admin_analytics_pie_charts.details: Three pie charts visible: Support Type Distribution (Phone/Hardware), SLA Performance (Within SLA/Breached), Team Workload (Tickets per Agent)

admin_analytics_bar_charts.details: Two bar charts: Tickets Handled by Agent, Avg Resolution Time (hrs)

admin_sso.details: Admin can access all internal dashboards: Support, Supervisor, Technician, Accountant, Dispatcher, Gate

accountant_hardware_tab.details: Hardware Tab (10 tickets) shows all note sections: SUPPORT AGENT NOTES (purple), ESCALATION NOTES (orange), SUPERVISOR DECISION (blue)
features: REVERSE PICKUP badge (orange) with Create Pickup Label button
SEND SPARE PART badge (blue) with Create Spare Dispatch button
Process Ticket button with 'No supervisor decision yet' warning
All ticket details: Issue Description, Customer info, Device, City

test_classes: TestAllRolesAuth (7 tests) - All role logins work
TestDuplicateTicketPrevention (3 tests) - Duplicate check API verified
TestAdminAnalytics (2 tests) - Stats and agent performance endpoints work
TestAdminSSO (5 tests) - Admin can access all internal endpoints
TestAccountantHardwareTab (3 tests) - Hardware tickets with notes fields
TestE2EWorkflow (8 tests) - Complete workflow steps verified
TestGateScan (1 test) - Gate logs endpoint works

frontend_tests.customer_create_ticket: PASS - Product selector and duplicate warning elements present
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows 656 total tickets, 476 open, Internal Dashboards (SSO) section
frontend_tests.admin_analytics: PASS - Pie charts and bar charts visible with real data
frontend_tests.admin_sso_dispatcher: PASS - Dispatcher Dashboard (55 ready to dispatch) accessible
frontend_tests.accountant_hardware_tab: PASS - All notes sections and action buttons visible
